name: Registry Browser
description: Public content browsing for a design registry. Search, filter, and explore patterns, themes, blueprints, archetypes, recipes, and shells.

pages.notes: Marketing landing for the registry. Hero with search, featured content grid, stats.
Public user profile showing published items and activity.

page_briefs.homepage: Registry landing with prominent search bar at top, featured/popular content grid below, and registry stats bar at bottom. No hero section — search is the hero.
page_briefs.browse: Search-first browsing page. Search bar with filter chips for content type (patterns, themes, blueprints, etc.) at the top. Below, a card grid of content items showing name, namespace badge, description preview, and tag pills.
page_briefs.browse-type: Filtered registry view for a specific content type. Same search and filter bar layout as main browse page, pre-filtered to the selected type. Card grid below with type-specific metadata on each card.
page_briefs.detail: Content detail page as a spatial bento grid. Glass-treated cards float over an immersive backdrop (faded screenshot for blueprints, animated type-colored orbs + geometric SVG for others). Identity card with name, namespace, type, version. Animated macOS terminal card with install command. Per-type cards surface rich data (personality, visual brief, palette, composition, routes, components, presets). JSON collapsed behind View Source toggle.
page_briefs.profile: Public profile showing avatar, username, bio, published item count. Below: grid of their published content cards + activity timeline.

shells.top-nav-main: Top navigation bar with main content area
